nodes.title: This converts the prompt injection response into a safe alert to save and pass on

widgets_values:
A more advanced sleep involves the same thing as THINK, except it's subconcious meaning there is no STM Summary, or STM to LTM embedding. It can only think, and it has STM and the current memory as input, plus any recalled LTM. The prompt is to edit the current LTM entry for the LTM as a JSON, to strengthen association keywords, to remove things that are wrong (where recalled LTM is returning LTM entries that correct any mistakes in the current LTM entry. Basically it's, "Hey here is a memory, but I remember it's wrong. Okay beetter update it. Her is another memory. Hey this relates to this other Memory I recalled which has this cool insight. Oh this memory had me freaking out, but I recall that this doesn't effect me anymore so this memory is not that intense anymore."

So it edits the current LTM entry, and then does a LTM search based on something in the current LTM entry. The search returns an associated memory, however it may be a complete tangent. So it's like a dream. The moment the Agent is interupted by a new input, the STM has the trail of dream memories in order and it can go "Oh wow, these STM entries make no sense. Was I dreaming?" Since it had no other inputs other than memories, it's not taking in information from the outside world.

The key here is cleaning up LTM while the agent isn't busy.

nodes.title: This is a log of when a Tool Call happens. It's for an audit trail. If there is ever a prompt injection or Unauthorized tool call, you can look it up here.
This switch is controlled by if the Tool response had a Prompt Injection from the LLM or not. True is safe. Sends the tool call onward.

widgets_values: ### find any Long Term Memories that are similar to this memory information below:

nodes.title: Brown = Last time it's called. When it's no longer valid
Green = First time it's called. When it's set.
Cyan = First time it's New value is called. When it's reset.
Red = Write, when a file becomes different from the get content version of it.

widgets_values:
This is a very rudementary Subconcious.

An advanced version you be earlier, when the Last Response is created. It would generate all the ideas and emotion and how valuable the memory is instantly. The Agent would read the Last Responses on the next loop and get the insights and emotion with no recolection of creating those elements attached to the memory.

However, due to the model not being able to handle the overload, the only time the agent will get those insights is when it recalls the LTM entry. This keeps this workflow more efficient for small models, while allowing the agent to explore LTM associations.

nodes.title: This switch is controlled by if the Tool response hat a Prompt Injection or not. True is safe. Sends the result of the LLM tool call or the LLM plain text.

### It's currently this Time and Date:


### This is the current sheduled task IDs and the time they were last requested:

Why the Boolean Switch and If Else for Path blocking?

ComfyUI refuses to allow multiple branch choices into 1 single node where only 1 input is active to trigger the rest of the branch. 

So we need an selector (in this case a Boolean) to select the branch that is the output and input which allows the rest of the workflow to run.

The Boolean here blocks other paths and only runs the selected path.

groups.title: ALL
STM: Maybe summarize the TOOL_CALL and or TOOL_RESPNSE so that the STM isn't overloaded.
Check For STM Overload
Create New and Write LTM Summary
Write the version without oldest STM, or write the version that's too short to transfer anything.
Check for double up issues
Is the Oldest Short Term Memory a duplicate of a Long Term Memory? If so ignore it.
Store the updated LTM
If Current Project = "" then stop, and possible Sleep. Else read it.
Get STM Summary Content
Get STM Content
Get Last Response Content
Get Heartbeat Schedule Content
Get LTM Content
IDENTITY
PROMPTS
Utilities Need Up To Date so Set later.
GET AND SET PATHS
Set Models
The Agent gets a few RAG LTM entries with the whole context, and it's up to the LLM to decide whatever it wants to do. Eventually the LTM will fill up to make it smarter.
Get Tools Content

Prompt Injection Security. Anything returned from the tool call is fed into an LLM that's mean to follow the rules (say it's safe) but prompt injection will have it respond differently, failing the test.
Get Task Request Content. Set before the Iteration loop so can be set now.
Get Heartbeat Content, Set before the Iteration loop so can be set now.
Get User Content
Get UserMessage Content
Get LLM Message Content
Ask the LLM to check tasks and any overdue are requested. Harness updates files accordingly. If none, then skip the task request.

Create LLM Message to user (even if it's blank). Chat service won't pass an empty message. If no LLM message, then the user message will go into Last Reponses, and may be forgotten if the agent does 13 or so things without responding.
Get The New Current Task if the Workflow has changed it.
If there is a Tool Key, Process the Tool Key, routing the main Tools through the Workflow, and the Rest to the Exec node.
THINK: The Agent gets a few RAG LTM entries with the whole context, and it's up to the LLM to decide whatever it wants to do. Eventually the LTM will fill up to make it smarter.

Prompt Injection Security. Anything returned from Main Agent is fed into an LLM that's meant to follow the rules (say it's safe) but prompt injection will have it respond differently, failing the test.
Tool Call Security.
Get Restricted Content
Since it's safe, it can be run. CMD is sent to CMD formating. Tools are sent to tool formatting. Result for tools is cleaned up. Output is passed through.
Get Recalled Content
Is Sleep Available?
Sleep, update LTM with new importance, forget least important
Is input nothing? True? Break. else send it through.
Only when it gets a task and actually works, will it be able to go back to sleep afterwards.
Make sure to set the Sleep Var in VARS to false so we don't trigger it over and over. Only after a task is set can the AI work enough to get sleepy again.
The Agent gets a few RAG LTM entries with the whole context, and it's up to the LLM to decide whatever it wants to do. Eventually the LTM will fill up to make it smarter.

Create the last response by checking if any parts exist, and if they do, construct the JSON and clean it, then append it to last responses and save it. Since there is a response, which should include the User Message, we can remove the user message to stop it from coming up over and over as if typing the same message over and over.
Construct Subconscious Data
Check For LAST_RESPONSES Overload
Write the version without OLDEST_LAST_RESPONSE, or write the version that's too short to transfer anything.
If there is a tool call, then delete the task request
Get SLEEP Value
Get Heartbeat Content, Set before the Iteration loop so can be set now.
